title: Railway authenticated-content cache exposure incident
source_title: Incident Report: March 30th, 2026 — Authenticated user data cached
why_selected: Recent provider-authored incident report with a crisp timeline, clear accidental trigger, explicit blast radius, and preventive measures.
selection_notes: Good case for distinguishing headline symptom (wrong-user data exposure) from the true bottleneck (unsafe cache-control defaults plus rollout safeguards).
